scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/db && bun --env-file=../../.env.local -- prisma migrate dev && cd ../..
scripts.db:generate: cd packages/db && bunx prisma generate && cd ../..
scripts.db:push: cd packages/db && bunx prisma db push
scripts.start:web: bun --env-file=.env.local -- turbo run build --filter=web && turbo run start --filter=web
scripts.start:http: bun run db:push && bun --env-file=.env.local -- turbo run build --filter=http-server && turbo run start --filter=http-server
